name: Kids' Lion Bean Bag Brown - Pillowfort™
description: Give your child a special spot to perch in their room with this Kids' Lion Bean Bag from Pillowfort™. This upholstered bean bag chair features soft beads enveloped by a soft fabric to offer them a comfortable seat as they sit and relax, watch television or read. Designed in a brown hue, it features a lion face on the back cushion with lion mane accents for fun style.
